content.en:
"Look for death!"

Ye Tian unleashed the Ancient God and Demon Spear, and a spear pierced the body of this Eternal Ancient Snake, nailing it into the void.

The power of the Ancient God Demon Spear exploded directly in its body, killing it in an instant.

An eternal ancient snake comparable to the four bone transformation realms died in Ye Tian's hands like this.

"It's still not very intelligent, and it doesn't matter how strong or weak I am, just attack me directly!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

After killing the Eternal Serpent, he moved on.

He couldn't copy the body of this Eternal Ancient Snake, because in terms of cultivation, he was only in the Bone Transformation Realm three times, and this Eternal Ancient Snake was in the Bone Transformation Realm four times, so he couldn't copy the Eternal Ancient Snake in the Bone Transformation Realm four times.

So, Ye Tian continued to move forward.

He had thought that the land beyond Eternity was full of resources, but now it seemed that was not the case.

At least, he walked through these areas, which were deserted everywhere and had no resources.

Of course, it is also possible that a lot of resources were bred and scraped away, so there are no resources left.

Thundered!!!!!

In the distance, the fluctuations of battle were heard, and the blazing light shone on the four space-time realms, burning endless nothingness.

Ye Tian stopped and felt these two breaths.

"Five Bone Transformation Realm Battles!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, one of the Bone Transformation Realms should be cultivators, and the other Bone Transformation Realm was an Eternal True Beast.

"The cultivators of the Fifth Bone Transformation Realm have a very unfamiliar breath, they are not the Lord of the True Dragon, the Lord of the Mixed Ruins, and they are not the other Bone Transformation Realms in the Territorial Sea Boundary Sea. "

Ye Tian guessed that this Fifth Bone Transformation Realm might be a cultivator who came out of a place similar to the Territorial Sea Boundary Seam.

Perhaps, he could get some useful information from this practitioner.

Thereupon.

He shuttled over to take a look.

......

"Damn, this Eternal Blood Bird is too fast, and its recovery ability is extremely terrifying, it can't be beaten!"

The Lord of the Dust frowned.

Soon.

He was wounded, by the Blood Prison Technique of the Eternal Blood Bird.

Abrupt.

The Eternal Blood Bird once again performed the Blood Prison Technique, but not a Blood Prison, but a triple Blood Prison.

Airplanes!!!

One blood prison after another, binding him in it, countless blood-colored threads running through it.

Puff puff puff!!!

The body of the Lord of Dust was pierced again and again.

He eventually used a secret technique and a life-saving object to forcibly break the Triple Blood Prison Technique.

"Run!"

The Lord of the Dust hastened to escape.

However, the Eternal Blood Bird was faster and easily caught up with him.

In a few moments, he was seriously injured.

It was then that he heard a voice that made him extremely excited.

"Would you like to help?"

This voice came from Ye Tian.

"Yes!"

The Lord of Xuanchen hurriedly said.

Wow!

A figure stopped the Eternal Blood Bird.

The Lord of Xuanchen sensed it and found that Ye Tian was only three bone transformation realms, and his face suddenly changed.

"Three bone transformation realms, cultivation is not as good as me!"

He wondered, how dare such a bone transformation realm come to save him?

Even if you are an ancient genius, it is difficult to beat the Eternal Blood Bird!

The Eternal Blood Bird of the Five Blood Transformation Realms can be called the top category among the five Bone Transformation Realms, otherwise he would not be unable to defeat them.

But soon, he was shocked.

Rumble!!!!

The claws of the Eternal Blood Bird attacked Ye Tian's body, and instead of breaking the defense, it was bounced out.

Ancient Eternal True Body Technique!

This is a top-notch primeval technique, and its defense is extremely powerful, and the Eternal Blood Bird naturally can't break through such a top-notch primeval technique.

Followed by.

The Eternal Blood Bird unleashed its Triple Blood Prison Technique.

One blood prison after another covered the area around Ye Tian.

"Be careful, this is the Triple Blood Prison Technique of the Eternal Blood Year, imprisoning the void, and also has the effect of sleepiness, and it can cast the Blood Prison Line, which can easily break through the defenses!" reminded the Lord of Dust.

Ye Tian nodded lightly, but he didn't care.

Puff puff puff!!!

The dense blood prison threads penetrated, but they still couldn't penetrate his primeval eternal true body technique, but instead caused these blood prison threads to shatter one by one and turn into nothingness.

"With such an attack power, I thought it was so powerful!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"Ancient God Demon Spear!"

With a spear and a stroke, it instantly tore through the triple blood prison technique.

Followed by.

Ye Tian stepped out and came to the Eternal Blood Bird.

The Eternal Blood Bird sensed the existence of the crisis and immediately cast another ability, the Eternal Blood Shield.

The dense blood-colored silk threads instantly superimposed to form a layer of shield, and its defensive power was also very terrifying.

However.

"Broken!"

Ye Tian held the Ancient God Demon Spear and stabbed it with a blow.

Click!!

The Eternal Blood Bird's Eternal Blood Shield was cracked.

"Hey, it's pretty sturdy!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Although he didn't exert all his strength, the power of this blow was enough to severely damage the top five Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, but it didn't break the eternal blood cover of the Eternal Blood Bird.

It is worthy of the land of eternity, and any eternal blood bird is not weak.

"If one blow doesn't work, then a second blow!"

Ye Tian attacked again.

This time, the Eternal Blood Shield didn't hold up.

Click!!!

The Eternal Blood Shield was shattered.

Then.

The Eternal Blood Bird used its indestructible wings to resist the front, trying to block Ye Tian's Ancient God and Demon Spear.

Rumble!!!!

The primeval god and demon spear struck the Eternal Blood Bird with a fierce blow, directly cracking the Eternal Blood Bird's wings, and even its flesh was shocked to the point that it was not lightly injured.

Bang!!!!

The Eternal Blood Bird quickly flew out, its body crashing through layers of void.

Then.

The Eternal Blood Bird tried to escape.

And Ye Tian was about to kill him, but he was stopped by the Lord of Xuanchen.

"Don't Kill the Eternal Blood Bird!!"

The Lord of the Dust blocked.

"Why can't you kill it?"

Ye Tian asked suspiciously.

The Lord of Xuan Chen said: "Don't you know the situation of the Eternal Blood Bird, in this area, the Eternal Blood Bird is the overlord, and once an Eternal Blood Bird is killed, it will leave a special mark, and the Bone Transformation Realm cannot be removed at all. In a short period of time, more Eternal Blood Birds will be attracted. Your Excellency saved me, I can't cause Your Excellency to fall!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

"What is your name?" asked, Lord of the Lower Dust.

"Endless Lord!" Ye Tian said lightly.

"Lord of Endless!" the Lord of Dust wrote down.

At this time, the Lord of Xuanchen said: "Endless Lord, you don't know about the Eternal Blood Bird, it shouldn't be the Heavenly Ancestor of the Bone Transformation Realm in this area, it is not from a distant region, and it is also for the opportunity of the Canghe Realm!"
